product_overview: Kicks & Comfort is a PHP/MySQL based full-stack e-commerce website specializing in footwear. It features user authentication, product browsing, AJAX shopping cart, coupon discounts, and an admin panel for management, designed with a modular MVC-like structure and modern responsive frontend.
core_goals: Provide a seamless shopping experience for customers to browse, search, and purchase shoes online.
Enable secure user registration, authentication with email activation, password management, and profile handling.
Allow administrators to manage products, categories, orders, users, coupons, and site content via a dedicated admin panel.
Implement a secure, zero-code-change deployment strategy ensuring smooth local-to-production transitions.
Ensure robust security via SQL injection prevention, CSRF protection, XSS sanitization, and login rate limiting.
Design a responsive, visually appealing UI with animations and accessibility in mind.
key_features: User registration with email activation, login with rate limiting, password reset using email OTP, and profile management with photo upload.
Product listing with filters, sorting, pagination, detailed product pages with image galleries and reviews.
AJAX-based shopping cart supporting add, update, remove operations and coupon application with validation.
Checkout flow with shipping information, coupon discounts, and simulated payment status update.
Admin panel with dashboard overview, product/category CRUD, order and user management, coupon management, and profile maintenance.
Contact form with email notifications, about and services/FAQ pages, and search functionality.
Security features including prepared statements, CSRF tokens on forms, XSS prevention, session management, and password hashing.
Responsive design implemented with Bootstrap 5 and enhanced with CSS animations, glassmorphism, and premium gradients.
user_flow_summary: User visits homepage to browse featured products, search or navigate to category listings.
User registers by submitting email and password; receives activation email, clicks activation link to enable account.
User logs in with rate limiting safeguards; can update profile, upload photo, view order history, and change password.
User browses product listings applying filters and sorting options; views product details with image gallery and reviews.
User adds products to cart using AJAX; updates quantities or removes items in cart page.
User applies coupon codes at checkout; system validates coupon eligibility and calculates discount.
User completes checkout by entering shipping information and selecting simulated payment method; order confirmation is recorded.
Admin logs in via separate admin panel; manages products, categories, orders, users, coupons and views sales reports.
Admin moderates product reviews, manages contact messages, and updates profile and password.
All form submissions validate inputs client-side (jQuery) and server-side; secure CSRF tokens prevent forgery.
validation_criteria: User registration requires unique email, valid password, and successful email activation before login.
Login applies rate limiting to prevent brute force attacks; password verification uses secure hashing.
Product filters and search accurately reflect database content with correct pagination and sorting.
Shopping cart AJAX operations correctly update session data and reflect accurate pricing with coupon discounts.
Checkout records orders with all relevant details and order status updates correctly.
Admin panel restricts access to authorized users only; CRUD actions persist changes to the database correctly.
Contact form submits validated data and triggers email notifications reliably.
CSRF tokens are present and validated on all sensitive forms to prevent cross-site request forgery.
Uploaded files validate file type and size before storage; all user inputs sanitized to prevent XSS.
Site layout responds properly to different devices and browsers; animations enhance UX without disrupting functionality.

directories.includes: Core PHP modules (auth, cart, db, email, security, functions)
directories.user: User authentication pages (login, register, profile, orders)

authentication.login: With rate limiting and session management

userFeatures.profile: View and edit profile with photo upload

shopping.coupons: Support for percentage and fixed discounts

knownIssues: Some admin panel features may be incomplete
Email functionality requires SMTP configuration in production
